reasoning: Order #000000549 shows the item was shipped and is currently held in customs for an extended period (45 days). Internal staff notes confirm this is an international customs delay, which is not covered under the standard refund policy. The recommendation on the order explicitly advises escalation to the international team to determine possible goodwill options (e.g., partial refund or reshipment). Since the package was not lost by the merchant and the delay is outside our control, this request should not be directly approved or denied, but escalated for specialized handling.
